meaning: n.软体动物杀灭剂,灭螺剂(亦作molluscacide)
examples: Objective to understand the acute toxicity of a plant-derived molluscicide Eomecon Chionantha Hance alkaloids ECA to fish.
The invention discloses a continuous quantitative suspension dosing device of liquid molluscicide, which belongs to the technical field of snail control of prevention and cure of schistosomiasis.
